description_long: This is a traditional Prussian Pickelhaube helmet, characterized by its black domed body and prominent gold spike at the top. The helmet features a decorative gold eagle insignia on the front, flanked by two large gold buckles and a brown band encircling the base. Gold rivets and trim accentuate the helmet, adding to its ornate appearance. The brim is slightly flared and edged with gold, providing both style and some protection. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with metallic highlights on the decorative elements. This helmet is historically associated with 19th-century German military uniforms and is both functional and ceremonial in design.
description: A black domed Pickelhaube helmet with a gold spike, eagle insignia, and ornate gold trim and buckles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold eagle insignia, two large gold buckles, and the central gold spike.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlighting the eagle insignia, one prominent buckle, and the gold trim along the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth black dome, gold rivets, and the full circular brown band with gold trim.
description_view_3: Front-right angle focusing on the gold spike, gold trim, and the side profile of the helmet's brim.
attribute_brim_style: narrow, slightly flared, with gold trim
attribute_crown_shape: domed with a tall central spike
